titleStmt.title: SII 4.274: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 274. (A.R. No. 45 of 1889). ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE RIGHT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE SHRINE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Every line of the inscription begins with an anusvāra. śubhamastu . svasti . śrī jayābhudayaśālivāha
naṣakavaruśa 1452 neya manmathasaṁvacharada
Āśvija bahuḷa 7 sōmavāradallu śrīmatu
śrī[man®](ṁ)mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa Acyutadēvamahārāya
ru pruthvīrājyaṁ geIUtaṁIralu śrīman®(ṁ)
mahāmaṁḍalēśvara śālikanārāyaṇaca
yahattamalla [Ā]trēyagōtrada śuklayathuReadyajuḥ.
śākheThis letter is incomplete on the original and looksanusvāra followed by a va.yaluṁpāṭi Allubhīmarājagaḷa ma
kkaḷu gōparājanavarige cikatiṁmapanu taṁ
ma tāItaṁdegaḷige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēku
yeṁdu śrīviṭhalēśvaradēvarige nityaU
dēvara saṁnidhāna [IkalasaUṁ dhanuvāsa ?]
naḍavadake dēvaUgrāṇadallu koḍuva U
pabatti nūlukrayakāgi pulivaṭavāgi
śrīviṭhaladēvara bhaṁḍārakke sama¨rpistadhu
ghaṭivaraha yiṁnūṟu varahake baṭaU
gaḷu voṁdakaṁ ghaṭivaraha 13 kaṁ sale ca
kra ga 543Ø kaṁ cinna 1 kaṁ ca ga 80 ... = ga
saṁnidhāna dīvige 60 kaṁ biḍuva vōḍa
tupa pa 4 . batti nūlu sahā Acaṁdra¨rka
stayiyāgi naḍavahāge sama¨rpistaU .
yi dha¨rmakke Ārobaru tapidare taṁma
tāyitaṁdegaḷanu vāraṇāsiyalli koṁ
da papake hōharu . Aśeti brahmeti śrīha
te bruṇahatyagaḷa māḍitha dō
ṣadalli hōharu . svadattād dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattanupālanaṁ . paraThe other half of the verse is omitted.
Digital edition of SII 4.274 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
